footer.ctaDescription: Experience Whiteintel, trusted by enterprises, MSSPs, and top researchers for real-time exposure monitoring.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our data coverage, integrations, and security standards.

items.question: What does Whiteintel monitor?
items.answer: We track credential leaks, infostealer logs, breached databases, dark web forums, Telegram channels, and other high-value sources. Our coverage ensures you see exposures before attackers can exploit them.

items.question: How often is the data updated?
items.answer: Our collection runs continuously, with most new exposures ingested within minutes of discovery. You get near real-time alerts for high-risk findings.

items.question: Can Whiteintel integrate with my existing tools?
items.answer: Yes — Whiteintel provides real-time webhook alerts and email notifications, allowing you to forward intelligence directly into your existing workflows or alerting systems.

items.question: What integrations are supported?
items.answer: Real-time webhooks and email alerts. You can route findings into SIEM, SOAR, ITSM, and chat tools your analysts already use.

items.question: What evidence do you provide?
items.answer: Compromised hostnames/IPs, malware paths, related URLs, credential pairs, cookies/tokens (when available), plus exportable JSON/CSV and deep-link references.

items.question: Can we white-label?
items.answer: Yes. Data and evidence can be presented under your brand in reports and portals. Ask us about options.

items.question: What identifiers can I search for?
items.answer: You can search across multiple identifiers including domain, subdomain, email address, email extension, IP address, and computer name. This flexibility allows you to detect exposures tied to your organization, employees, or customers quickly and accurately.

items.question: Do you provide malware file paths?
items.answer: Yes. We extract malware installation paths, browser profile directories, and stealer loot locations when available. These are correlated to hostnames, IPs, and AD users to accelerate endpoint isolation and cleanup.

items.question: Do you provide historical breach data?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can search our archive of historical breaches and exposures to identify long-standing vulnerabilities and compromised accounts.

items.question: Is my data stored securely?
items.answer: Yes. We use encrypted storage, strict access controls, and follow industry best practices to protect all customer data.
